reviews.review_description:
I really liked this and would like to thank you for letting me visit this stunning place in VR! 

I do have some suggestions for improvement, though, and that’s why I have only given 4 stars.

The images are beautiful, but I miss having sound. When I click on a circle to learn more, I would prefer to have an audio guide, instead of a text window that’s blocking my view of the surroundings. Some ambient sounds, like hearing birds in the garden, would also have been nice.

I’m on the Oculus Go and for me the videos aren’t showing at all, unfortunately.

Edit: With the latest update the videos are now showing. Thanks for fixing it!
